content.short_description: I'm a software developer with a Master's degree in bioinformatics and three years of commercial experience working with Java and Spring Boot-based projects. I am passionate about artificial intelligence, natural language processing, and technological innovations in the IT world. I regularly follow the development of programming tools, frameworks, and trends in system architecture. I value clean, understandable code structure, work automation, and sharing knowledge with the team.

content.title: Full Stack Developer
description: Designing and developing microservicebased applications primarily using Java,SprinBoot, and Angular technologies.
Designing business processes, integrating with RabbitMQ and Keycloak.
Maintaining and developing solutions implemented in a Kubernetes environment.
Analyzing and adapting the project to the client's business needs.

content.title: Master of Science in Bioinformatics
description: Writing more advanced programs for biotechnological problems.
Introduction to machine learning and artifical inteligence.
Learning how to write statistical programs with R.

content.title: Bachelor's degree in bioinformatics
description: Learning problem solving, finding solutions and debugging.
Developing logical thinking in context of programming and problem solving.

content.title: Portfolio
content.description: This portfolio project was developed using the latest version of Angular, along with TypeScript, HTML, and SCSS. I created it not only to showcase my work but also to challenge myself and deepen my understanding of modern Angular features and best practices.
